channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Penticton Peach Classic Triathlon Sees Record Participation, Boosting Local Economy
item.description: The 43rd annual Peach Classic Triathlon in Penticton, B.C., is set to attract over 1,100 athletes, a 60% increase from last year, according to organizers. This surge in participation is expected to ge...

item.title: Political Leaders Show Unity at Funeral Service Ahead of 2027 Election
item.description: The funeral service of Mrs Sabainah Ibironke Opawole, mother of Yeye Olufunke Daniel and mother-in-law of former Ogun State Governor Otunba Gbenga Daniel, turned into a political gathering. Key figure...

item.title: CDC Staff Cuts Hinder Cyclospora Outbreak Response
item.description: The article discusses how the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) has faced significant staffing reductions, particularly in its cyclospora outbreak response lab, which was downsized from...

item.title: Winnipeg Blue Bombers to Start Dru Brown Against Ottawa RedBlacks After QB Collaros Injury
item.description: The Winnipeg Blue Bombers have confirmed that quarterback Zach Collaros will miss the team's Week Seven matchup against the Ottawa RedBlacks due to a neck injury, marking his second consecutive game a...

item.title: Protecting Health During Wildfire Smoke Events: A Comprehensive Guide
item.description: Wildfire smoke poses significant health risks due to its particulate matter, which can infiltrate the bloodstream and cause damage to the heart, lungs, and other organs. The article emphasizes the imp...

item.title: Delhi High Court's Order Disrupts Consular Services, Government Seeks Supreme Court Intervention
item.description: The Delhi High Court's recent order has disrupted consular and visa services at four foreign missions in India, prompting the government to seek urgent intervention from the Supreme Court. The court's...

item.title: NASA Tests Advanced Wing Design for Fuel Efficiency
item.description: NASA researchers conducted extensive tests on a new wing design called SWEET-15 to evaluate its structural limits and potential for improving aircraft efficiency. The 15-foot-long wing, developed usin...

item.title: Philippines Sends Four Climbers to Global Youth Championship
item.description: The article highlights the participation of four Filipino climbers who will compete in the World Climbing Youth Championships. These athletes, including Paige Javier, are part of a growing trend in Ph...

item.title: Tamil Nadu Delimitation Bill Debate Intensifies as State Interests at Stake
item.description: The article discusses the ongoing debate in Tamil Nadu regarding the delimitation bill, which aims to redraw electoral boundaries. Opposition parties have raised concerns about the potential impact on...

item.title: India Examines Bangladesh’s Extradition Request for Sheikh Hasina Amid Bilateral Tensions
item.description: India has confirmed that it is examining Bangladesh's extradition request for former Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina, who has been in self-exile since fleeing Bangladesh in August 2024. The demand, first...

item.title: Political Realignments and Defections Reshape Bangsamoro Political Landscape
item.description: Political realignments continue to reshape the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM) ahead of the September 14 parliamentary elections. Key leaders, including Maguindanao del Sur Rep...

item.title: Former GOP Operative Notes Trump's Physical Decline During Primetime Speech
item.description: In a recent episode of The Lincoln Project Podcast, former GOP operative Rick Wilson detailed his observations of former President Donald Trump's physical decline during a primetime speech. Wilson, wh...

item.title: Garry Sobers: Cricket's Greatest All-Rounder and His Impact on the Game
item.description: Garry Sobers, the legendary West Indies all-rounder, is hailed as the greatest of all time, combining batting, bowling, and fielding prowess. His career spanned over a decade, with remarkable stats in...

item.title: Cartels Continue Using Underground Tunnels for Human Smuggling Despite Border Security Measures
item.description: A recent investigation by Fox News reveals that cartels are still utilizing an extensive network of storm drain tunnels in El Paso, Texas, to smuggle migrants from Mexico into the United States. These...

item.title: Tanzania Recognized for Sustainable Development Progress in UN Forum
item.description: Tanzania has been acknowledged for its advancements in achieving the United Nations' Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) during a recent international forum. The recognition highlights the country's ...

item.title: Kelechi Iheanacho Joins Bursaspor in Turkey
item.description: Kelechi Iheanacho, Nigerian striker, has completed a transfer to Turkish club Bursaspor after rejecting a contract extension with Celtic. The 29-year-old signed a three-year deal with the newly promot...

item.title: Aubameyang Joins Deportivo La Coruna from Marseille on 2028 Contract
item.description: Gabon international striker Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang has officially transferred to Spanish club Deportivo La Coruna from Marseille, signing a contract until 2028. The 37-year-old forward, who had one...

item.title: Ann Droid: A Heartwarming Robot Comedy About Elderly Care
item.description: Ann Droid is a British comedy series that explores the relationship between an elderly widow, Sue, and her robot carer, Linda. The show blends humor with emotional depth, examining themes of lonelines...
